sections.paragraph:
Shelomith 1. Mother of a blasphemer
Lev 24:11
2. Daughter of Zerubbabel
1Ch 3:19
3. Son of Shimei
1Ch 23:9
4. A son of Izhar
- General references
1Ch 23:18
- Called Shelomoth
1Ch 24:22
5. A descendant of Eliezer
1Ch 26:26; 1Ch 26:28
6. A son or daughter of Rehoboam
2Ch 11:20
7. Ancestor of a family that returned with Ezra from captivity in Babylon
Ezr 8:10
